auth.title: Welcome back
auth.intro: Use your username and password. If you prefer, continue with your FNMT certificate.

status.loginError: We couldn't sign you in. Check your details and try again.
status.networkError: We couldn't reach the service. Check your connection and try again.

username.label: Username
username.hint: Use the username assigned to your account.

certificate.hint: We'll take you to certificate sign-in. If your browser finds an FNMT certificate, choose it when prompted.
certificate.unavailable: FNMT certificate sign-in is only available in desktop browsers.

register.title: Create your account
register.intro: Register a new user with the core identity data, password, and an optional FNMT certificate file.
register.footer: The registration request creates the user profile and the related password record.
register.levelNotice: New self-service registrations are created with the default access level: normal.

identity.title: Account identity
identity.intro: Start with the core identity fields used to define the user account.

contact.title: Contact and address
contact.intro: Add the main contact email and a single location field that we can normalize for the database.

security.title: Password and access
security.intro: Create the password record for the new account.

certificate.title: FNMT certificate
certificate.intro: Attach an FNMT certificate now, or skip this step and finish the registration.

done.title: Account created
done.intro: The new account is ready for sign-in.

status.success: The account was created successfully. You can sign in now.
status.error: We couldn't create the account. Review the data and try again.
status.networkError: We couldn't reach the registration service. Check your connection and try again.

username.label: Username
username.hint: This identifier is used for sign-in and must be unique.

fullName.label: Full name
fullName.hint: Enter the person's full name or the institutional contact name.

phoneNumber.label: Phone number
phoneNumber.hint: Optional. The country code defaults from the current page language, and you can change it before entering the local number.
phoneNumber.countryCodeHint: Selected phone prefix: {{dialCode}}. Search by country name, ISO code, or calling code.

email.label: Email address
email.hint: We'll use this address for access and account recovery notifications.

location.label: Location
location.hint: Optional. Start typing the full street address including the house number and choose an exact suggestion.
location.lookupError: We couldn't load location suggestions right now. You can still continue.
location.selectExact: Choose one of the exact address suggestions with a house number.
location.needsHouseNumber: Include the house number in the search before we can suggest addresses.
location.noExactResults: No exact address with a house number was found.
location.requiredExact: Choose an exact address that includes the house number.

defaultLanguage.label: Default language
defaultLanguage.hint: This language will be stored as the preferred interface language.

confirmPassword.label: Confirm password
confirmPassword.hint: Re-enter the password exactly as you typed it above.

certificate.label: FNMT certificate
certificate.hint: Optional. Upload a certificate file now if this account should later sign in with FNMT.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.intro: Use your email, verify the code, and set a new password.

form.codeSent: We sent a verification code to {{email}}.
form.emailStepIntro: Enter the email linked to your account and we'll send you a verification code.
form.codeStepIntro: Check your email and paste the verification code here.
form.passwordStepIntro: Choose a new password you haven't used recently.
form.doneIntro: Your password has been updated. You can sign in now.
form.doneBody: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new credentials.

email.label: Email address
email.hint: Use the email associated with your account so we can send you a verification code.
email.required: Enter the email address associated with your account.

code.label: Verification code
code.hint: Enter the code from your email. A single input is easier to paste and works better with assistive technology.

password.label: New password
password.hint: Use at least 8 characters. A longer passphrase is usually easier to remember and harder to guess.

confirmPassword.label: Confirm new password
confirmPassword.hint: Re-enter the password exactly as you typed it above.
